scopeNote: SYBEORG only. Radi / House of Meroe targets, drafts, files, and accounts are excluded.

leads.gmbSignals: Google Maps limited view: 4.6 stars, Auto repair shop, 525 Southgate Ave, Closed · Opens 8 AM, phone (319) 354-3932, website button present.
leads.diagnosis: bug_or_urgent_fix: website button resolves to a domain that currently fails with an expired certificate / browser privacy warning.
leads.bestHook: Their Maps listing has solid local proof, but the first website click can scare off mobile visitors before they see the shop details.
leads.subject: quick website issue I noticed for Number One Auto
leads.draftCopy:
Hi Number One Auto team — I was checking Iowa City auto repair listings and noticed your Google Maps website link is going to a browser security warning for number1autorepair.com. That kind of warning can make a normal repair customer back out before they ever see your phone number or hours.

I put together a sample page showing how the first screen could look with your phone, Southgate Ave location, repair categories, and a clear mobile call button: https://sybeorg-mockups.vercel.app/number-one-auto/

If the direction is useful, I can clean this up with the real details.

leads.gmbSignals: Google Maps limited view: 4.8 stars, Auto repair shop, 533 Southgate Ave, Closed · Opens 8:30 AM, phone (319) 569-2176, website button present.
leads.diagnosis: bug_or_urgent_fix: official website route lands on a Google sign-in page instead of a public website in browser and requests.
leads.bestHook: Strong Maps rating, but the public website path appears locked behind Google sign-in, which blocks new customers from seeing services.
leads.subject: quick public website issue for S & D Auto Repair
leads.draftCopy:
Hi S & D Auto Repair team — I was reviewing Iowa City auto repair listings and noticed your Maps website link is sending visitors to a Google sign-in screen instead of a public page. Your listing already shows strong trust signals, so it would be a shame for new customers to hit a login wall.

I made a sample concept showing a simple public page with your phone, Southgate Ave location, repair services, and a mobile call path: https://sybeorg-mockups.vercel.app/sd-auto-repair-center/

If the direction is useful, I can clean this up with the real details.

leads.gmbSignals: Google Maps limited view: 5.0 stars, Tree service, Closed · Opens 8 AM, phone (319) 853-8105, no website button visible.
leads.diagnosis: needs_website: strong rating signal but no public website found in limited Maps result.
leads.bestHook: A simple first website could turn Maps interest into calls for trimming, removal, and storm cleanup.
leads.subject: sample first website for Grenell Tree Service
leads.draftCopy:
Hi Grenell Tree Service team — I came across your Iowa City-area listing and saw a strong 5-star signal, but I did not see a website button in the public Maps view. For tree work, a simple mobile page can help people quickly confirm services and call when they have a limb, removal, or cleanup issue.

I put together a first-site concept with the phone number, service categories, and a fast estimate/call path: https://sybeorg-mockups.vercel.app/grenell-tree-service/

If the direction is useful, I can clean this up with the real details.

leads.business: Eastern Iowa Spray Foam & Waterproofing LLC
leads.gmbSignals: Google Maps limited view: 4.1 stars, Waterproofing service, IA-100, phone (319) 447-7480, website button present; hours not visible in limited result.
leads.emailSource: official site footer/contact section on https://www.easterniowasprayfoam.com/
leads.diagnosis: needs_better_website / needs_gmb: older Hibu-style site with dated layout/widgets and Maps limited view did not show hours; opportunity for clearer basement-waterproofing CTA.
leads.bestHook: They already have services and experience claims on-site; a sharper landing page can make basement waterproofing and sump-pump requests easier to act on.
leads.subject: sample waterproofing page for Eastern Iowa Spray Foam
leads.draftCopy:
Hi Eastern Iowa Spray Foam & Waterproofing team — I was looking at Cedar Rapids waterproofing options and noticed your site has the right services listed, but the mobile path could be much clearer for someone dealing with basement water or sump pump issues. I also noticed the public Maps view I saw did not show hours.

I built a sample concept that puts basement waterproofing, sump pumps, free estimates, and your phone/email in a cleaner first screen: https://sybeorg-mockups.vercel.app/eastern-iowa-spray-foam-waterproofing/

If the direction is useful, I can clean this up with the real details.

leads.gmbSignals: Google Maps limited view: 3.9 stars, Electrician, 1807 Stevens Dr, Closed · Opens 7 AM, phone (319) 213-9050, website button present.
leads.emailSource: official site contact/footer section on https://www.gerardelectric.com/
leads.diagnosis: skip_or_nurture / needs_gmb: site itself is functional and includes services, emergency availability, hours, phone, and email; strongest angle is reputation/profile cleanup rather than a new mockup.
leads.bestHook: If approached later, keep it profile/review cleanup focused, not a website teardown.
leads.subject: quick profile cleanup note for Gerard Electric
leads.draftCopy:
Hi Gerard Electric team — I was reviewing Iowa City electrician listings and saw your site already has useful service info, emergency availability, hours, phone, and email. The main thing I noticed is less about rebuilding the site and more about tightening the public profile/reputation path so the listing matches the strength of a long-running local contractor.

No pitchy teardown here — just a quick cleanup/audit could be useful if you want it. If the direction is useful, I can clean this up with the real details.
